name: Cream of Curried Corn Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté 4 cups of corn kernels and chopped onion in 2 tablespoons butter until the corn is tender and the onion is translucent.
2. Stir in 2 tablespoons flour, 1 teaspoon curry powder (or to taste), salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
3. Add 2 cups chicken stock and 2 cups half-and-half. Bring mixture to a boil, then simmer until slightly thickened.
4. Process the soup in batches using a food processor or blender until smooth.
5. Garnish with popcorn.
6. Makes 6 servings.
